Translation.title: Translation
Translation.description: Cached translations to avoid redundant Gemini API calls.

originalText.description: The original text that was translated.

targetLanguage.description: The language code the text was translated into (e.g., 'pt-br').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the translation was cached.

/translations/{translationId}.description: Collection of cached translations indexed by a hash of the original text and target language.
